title: Lifewit 4 Pack 36 Grids Clear Stackable Plastic Organizer Storage Box Container with Adjustable Dividers for Beads, Art DIY, Crafts, Jewelry, Fishing Tackle with 5 Sheet Label Stickers
features: High Quality Transparent Material: Made of durable PP material, the transparent material makes it easy and quick to find beads, jewelry, miniature models and some crafts. Easy to access at a glance.

Proper Capacity: The compartment organizer box comes in a 3-piece container(only the box and stickers are included), with detachable dividers which can create 36 compartments once set up completely. The overall dimensions are 10.39"(26.4cm) × 7.08"(18cm) × 1.65"(4.22cm), while for each single compartment the dimensions are 1.66"(4.22cm) × 1.05"(2.7cm) × 1.35"(3.44cm).

Detachable Dividers: Each compartment in the beads organizer can be freely established with dividers in either horizontal or vertical format. The removable horizontal dividers can be cut into single pieces for any space of the sections to fit different items in various shape.

Protect Your Items: This beads organizer and storage box has an easy-to-open lid and two durable latches that stay firmly closed when pressed shut, keeping things neat inside. When the lid is closed, there is no gap between the compartments, so small items don’t move and do not interact with each other.

Multi-Functional Design: This craft box with internal compartments is perfect for storing beads, jewelry, earrings, crafts, ornaments, miniatures, buttons, small toys, safety pins and can also be used as a stone collection for anything you like. There are 5 labels (200 pieces in total) attached to conveniently mark and distinguish the placement of items.

No Sliding Protected compartments contain items inside and do not slide unnecessarily.
